script.name: !lib.get.valid.flying.wares
script.description: Get valid flying wares in a sector
script.sourceplaintext:
$debug = [FALSE] $flags = [Find.Nearest] | [Find.Multiple] * $flags = [Find.Multiple] | [Find.Nearest] $waresFlying = find flying ware: sector=$sector maintype=null subtype=null flags=$flags refobj=[THIS] maxdist=null maxnum=100, refpos=null $waresFlying = reverse array $waresFlying skip if $waresFlying return null $i = size of array $waresFlying skip if $i return null
$waresToConsider = array alloc: size=0 $waresToReturn = array alloc: size=0 skip if $waresToIgnore $waresToIgnore = array alloc: size=0
* Check each flying ware in case it's already been flagged to be ignored. $j = size of array $waresToIgnore while $j dec $j = $w = $waresToIgnore[$j] find and remove: $w from array $waresFlying if $debug $prepend = 'Ware in ignore array' gosub sub.Debug end end
$race = [THIS] -> get owner race if $race == Player gosub sub.checkWaresForPlayer else gosub sub.checkWaresForAI end
$i = size of array $waresToConsider
if not $ships gosub sub.WaresSingleShip else $numberOfShips = size of array $ships if $numberOfShips gosub sub.WaresMultipleShips else gosub sub.WaresSingleShip end end
$return = table alloc $return['ignore'] = $waresToIgnore $return['valid'] = $waresToReturn
return $return
* =========================================== * SUB: Check if wares are suitable for a player owned ship to collect * =========================================== sub.checkWaresForPlayer: * Ignore any wares unknown by the player while $i dec $i = $w = $waresFlying[$i] skip if $w -> is known continue if not $w -> is of class Ware Container append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end append $w to array $waresToConsider end endsub * =========================================== * SUB: Check if wares are suitable for an AI race owned ship to collect * =========================================== sub.checkWaresForAI: while $i @ = wait randomly from 10 to 30 ms dec $i = $w = $waresFlying[$i] if not $w -> is of class Ware Container append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end if $w -> is invincible append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end * dont collect anything tagged with discovery points (player only) if $w ->get discovery points append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end if $w ->is flying ware blueprint append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end $ware = $w -> get ware type code of object * dont collect upgrade (ie engine/rudder), these are player only if is upgrade: ware=$ware append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end * $amt = $w-> get flying ware count append $w to array $waresToConsider end endsub
* =========================================== * SUB: Check each ware if any ship from an array of ships can transport it. * =========================================== sub.WaresMultipleShips: while $i dec $i = $w = $waresToConsider[$i] $ware = $w -> get ware type code of object $amt = $w -> get flying ware count $volume = get volume of ware $ware $volume = $amt * $volume
$canBeTransported = [FALSE] $j = $numberOfShips while $j dec $j = $ship = $ships[$j]
if $ship -> can transport ware $ware $cargoBaySize = $ship -> get cargo bay size if $cargoBaySize > $volume $canBeTransported = [TRUE] break end end end if $canBeTransported == [TRUE] append $w to array $waresToReturn else if $debug $prepend = 'No drone cargo bay sufficient for ware' gosub sub.Debug end append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end end endsub
* =========================================== * SUB: Check each ware if the script calling ship can transport it. * =========================================== sub.WaresSingleShip: while $i dec $i = $w = $waresToConsider[$i] $ware = $w -> get ware type code of object if not [THIS] -> can transport ware $ware append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end if not [THIS] -> get free amount of ware $ware in cargo bay append $w to array $waresToIgnore continue end append $w to array $waresToReturn end endsub * =========================================== * SUB: Log information about ware container * =========================================== sub.Debug: $logObjectID = $w -> get ID code $logSector = $w -> get sector $logAmount = $w -> get flying ware count $logWare = $w -> get ware type code of object $logVolume = get volume of ware $logWare $logVolume = $amt * $logVolume $logTransportClass = get transport class of ware $logWare $logTransportClass = get short transport class name: class=$logTransportClass $string1 = sprintf: fmt='%s | ID: %s | Ware: %s | Count: %s | Volume: %s', $prepend, $logObjectID, $logWare, $logAmount, $logVolume write to log file #$debug append=[TRUE] printf: fmt='%s | Container Class: %s | Sector: %s', $string1, $logTransportClass, $logSector, null, null endsub return null

comment.var: Check each flying ware in case it's already been flagged to be ignored.
SUB: Check if wares are suitable for a player owned ship to collect
Ignore any wares unknown by the player
SUB: Check if wares are suitable for an AI race owned ship to collect
dont collect anything tagged with discovery points (player only)

line.text: get ware type code of object

comment.var: dont collect upgrade (ie engine/rudder), these are player only
SUB: Check each ware if any ship from an array of ships can transport it.

line.text: get ware type code of object

line.var: 'No drone cargo bay sufficient for ware'

comment.var: SUB: Check each ware if the script calling ship can transport it.

line.text: get ware type code of object

comment.var: SUB: Log information about ware container

line.text: get ware type code of object
get short transport class name: class=

sval.val: Get valid flying wares in a sector
No drone cargo bay sufficient for ware
Check each flying ware in case it's already been flagged to be ignored.
SUB: Check if wares are suitable for a player owned ship to collect
Ignore any wares unknown by the player
SUB: Check if wares are suitable for an AI race owned ship to collect
dont collect anything tagged with discovery points (player only)
dont collect upgrade (ie engine/rudder), these are player only
SUB: Check each ware if any ship from an array of ships can transport it.
SUB: Check each ware if the script calling ship can transport it.
SUB: Log information about ware container
